So you've got branches, which are these lines here, and then you've got nodes, which are these circles here. And a node is basically where a branch splits out into multiple other branches, and a branch is just a line between different nodes. And that's how systems are made up. And then a system is a collective of everything. So a collective of all branches and all nodes. And this is very simple. Now if you only put one ad in there with only one image and one audience, that means that you're only putting one variation in the Garden of Eden.
